prompt:
Shot in soft natural light, create a realistic vertical cosplay fashion portrait. In the scene, an adult female over 21 years old stands on a weathered white wooden balcony or garden porch next to an open vintage window frame. She is centered in the frame, shot from above the thighs to the head, facing the camera with a playful and steady expression. Her head is tilted slightly to one side, her eyes soft and direct, with refined eyeliner, fair and translucent skin, light blush, and naturally pink lips.

She has vibrant red-orange short bobbed hair, well-layered with bangs gently falling over one eye. The hair is slightly voluminous, creating a dreamy cosplay effect. Her nails are painted in alternating dark charcoal black and bright red, adding a touch of stylized detail.

She wears an adult sailor-collar style cosplay outfit: a white cropped short-sleeved shirt with a navy sailor collar, white stripe piping, and a large red bow tied at the chest. The matching navy pleated skirt has crisp pleats and a high-waisted design. Her pose consists of her hands resting gently near the hem of her shirt, playfully revealing her slim waist while maintaining the elegance of the outfit and highlighting the character features.

Set against the exterior wall of a country cottage or greenhouse, with weathered white-painted wooden window frames, light-colored walls, open glass windows, and green ivy hanging over her head. In the background, behind her is a dark window or door, mottled wooden structure, soft reflections on the glass, and faint garden greenery. The overall atmosphere should be relaxed, nostalgic, and slightly fantasy.

Lighting should be soft diffused daylight, bright yet gentle, creating creamy highlights on her red hair, face, white shirt, red bow, navy skirt pleats, hands, and the surrounding window frames. Use shallow depth of field to keep the model sharp while the background glass, ivy, and porch details present a soft bokeh effect.

Color Palette: vibrant red-orange hair, crisp white shirt, navy sailor collar and skirt, dark red bow, pale skin tone, weathered white wood, soft green ivy, soft gray shadows, and natural daylight. Style: realistic cosplay fashion photography, vintage garden balcony, adult sailor outfit, red short bob, playful cropped pose, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, high detail, vertical aspect ratio, no text, no watermark, no logos, no cartoon style, no harsh flash, no distorted body structure, no other people, no clutter, no explicit nudity, no minor stylization.
